posts.title: Monochrome HTML Sample
posts.excerpt: Monochrome HTML Sample This is a sample HTML post. The builder extracts the body content and displays it as a post. Links , lists, images, and tables can live in your raw HTML posts.
posts.text_content: Monochrome HTML Sample This is a sample HTML post. The builder extracts the body content and displays it as a post. Links , lists, images, and tables can live in your raw HTML posts.
posts.content_html:
Monochrome HTML Sample

This is a sample HTML post. The builder extracts the body content and displays it as a post.

Links, lists, images, and tables can live in your raw HTML posts.

posts.title: Terminal Log
posts.excerpt: Terminal Log This is a sample plain text post. Everything inside /posts is turned into a blog entry if it ends in .md, .txt, or .html.

posts.title: Welcome to Honestly Thomas
posts.excerpt: Welcome to Honestly Thomas This is a sample markdown post. Add more posts in /posts Push to GitHub Let the workflow rebuild /data/posts.json You can search this post with ?q=welcome .
posts.text_content: Welcome to Honestly Thomas This is a sample markdown post. Add more posts in /posts Push to GitHub Let the workflow rebuild /data/posts.json You can search this post with ?q=welcome .
posts.content_html:
Welcome to Honestly Thomas

This is a sample markdown post.

  • Add more posts in /posts
  • Push to GitHub
  • Let the workflow rebuild /data/posts.json

You can search this post with ?q=welcome.
